overview.description: The iShares 7-10 Year Treasury Bond ETF (IEF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury (7-10 Y) index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of debt issued by the US Treasury with 7-10 years to maturity remaining. Treasury STRIPS are excluded. IEF was launched on Jul 22, 2002 and is issued by BlackRock.
